stadium.name: Fletchings Field
stadium.description: Fletchings Field was the first formal Troll Ball stadium in Warden lands. The design balances wood and stone, with arrowhead motifs and banners representing each region under Warden protection. The field includes trees, gully's and other obstacle placements, changed each match by local druids and terrain crafters.

stats.pregame_ritual: Going over the game plan drawn in the dirt with the team captain.
Leading the team in a synchronized chant that slowly gets louder.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Giving the Trollball a heroic backstory before each game.
Headbutting their own team's goal post (gently).
Sticking a specific type of feather in their helmet's plume.
Burying their helmet in the ground and then digging it back up.
Reading their own fortune in a scattering of knuckle bones.
Wearing a specific, garishly colored pair of undergarments.
Always putting on their left gauntlet before their right.

stadium.name: The Buccaneer's Bowl
stadium.description: A flashy, pristine stadium built on a private beach exclusively for resort guests. The field is imported turf, and a massive, puppet kraken in the bay entertains the crowd at halftime.

stats.pregame_ritual: Slapping their own helmet until their ears ring.
Sticking leeches to their legs to 'lighten their step'.
Bribing a local oracle with a meat pie for a vague prophecy.
Reviewing hand signals for secret plays.
Reading their own fortune in a scattering of knuckle bones.
Thanking their armor for the protection it's about to offer.
Painting their teeth with a mixture of charcoal and water.
Doing a series of loud, guttural breathing exercises.
Reciting their grocery list backward to clear their mind.
Clapping their hands a prime number of times.
Chugging a raw egg, shell and all.

preGame:
Well, howdy, sports fans, and welcome to the grandest spectacle of muscle and mayhem on the entire plane of Osterra! This is it, folks, the ultimate clash in the Grand Finals Bracket Reset! The Tortell Privateers, fresh off their dazzling run, take the field against the mighty Oak & Onslaught, all in the glorious setting of The Buccaneer's Bowl at Toast Island Resort! Golly, the atmosphere here is electric, folks, and with those Distracted Tourists and that Blinding Sun beating down, the action is guaranteed to be as unpredictable as a rogue Fey! 

The Tortell Privateers, backed by the fine patrons of Cedar Hill, are ready to prove they are the true masters of chaos! Watch them, folks! I hear their healer, Eugen Zacks, is already slapping his own helmet until his ears ring—a fine ritual for focusing the fury! And Lilithe Royce, bless her heart, she's got leeches stuck to her legs to 'lighten her step'! We expect her to dance across that turf and leave a trail of opponents in her wake! 

But let us not dismiss the rugged warriors of Oak & Onslaught! They are the champions of the Warden lands, and they march out here under the watchful gaze of their own protectors! They bring the grit, they bring the terrain mastery, and with Modifiers like Shifting Terrain thrown in, they are ready to throw down! We'll see if their famed dedication can overcome the glittering finesse of the Tortell crew! Can the Privateers outmaneuver the onslaught, or will Oak & Onslaught prove too much for this pristine stadium? Tune in, folks, because this is going to be a brawl!
postGame:
Huzzah! What a titanic tussle! What a display of raw, glorious Trollball action here at The Buccaneer's Bowl! The dust has settled, the last tackle has been made, and the score reads: The Tortell Privateers take the victory over Oak & Onslaught, 4 to 0! A magnificent performance from the Privateers, folks, truly! 

From the opening whistle, the violence was staggering! Dib Tufts of the Tortell Privateers found the end zone early with a powerful carry, but it was Loralee Sunny who delivered the first truly masterful shot from the Center Field! And don't forget that second, equally breathtaking point when Dib Tufts struck again! Oak & Onslaught just couldn't find their footing against that slick Tortell offense! 

We saw tackles flying left and right! Melisande Eustacia was brought down by the terrain shift and later by a nasty strike from Millham Evangeline, proving that even a Talwar-wielding champion can be humbled by a poorly placed boot! The shifting turf here at the resort stadium made the Oak players look like they were trying to run on a churning sea, but the Privateers, led by the magnificent Lilithe Royce, kept the ball moving with such grace! 

And oh, the fight! Goldberg Tova hammered Symer Crissy, and even after Ahron Latashia brought the poor warrior back to the field, the Privateers pressed the advantage! Oak & Onslaught simply could not crack the code against the Tortell machine! While the Haven Lights might have their own meager fan base, the Tortell Privateers have proven they are the ones to watch! A spectacular win for the Privateers, and a huge step toward claiming the championship crown! What a game!
